title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kaido as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't be able to cover this up...!! The whole world will latch on to this news.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The timing could not be any worse!! How do we deal with this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you certain the elephant is gone?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes... it wandered into the mist.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the borders are staying closed for now...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: That means Wano is still almost imperntrable!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It appears that they have modified their plan in light of the current situation. At least one of them has considerable guile.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, even with our numbers, a direct invasion will be impossible.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can still have nice Robin brought to us... correct?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stay where you are... B22T B22T!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: After 20 years of tyranny in Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the news of the Kozuki victory is being met with jubilation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DRAKE.... so you were a marine dog this whole time?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You really expect me to answer that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ....don't you have anything else to say?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I thought those precious cards of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...promised you'd be safe if you stuck with Kaido...

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
